data.current_description: Convert words to their base form (lemma) for text processing.
data.summary_suggestion: Convert words to their base lemma form
data.description_suggestion: Lemmatizes input text by converting words to their base form (lemma). Accepts text input and returns lemmatized results with base forms for each word. Useful for text normalization and linguistic analysis. Supports English lexical entries from the 800,000+ entry dictionary.
